name: Pro Builder 3D
description: Pro Builder 3D is a satisfying build-and-sell simulation about turning raw wood into dream houses and big profit. Move your character around the 3D construction site, transport logs, drop them at the work area, and hire workers to help you build faster. Watch the house rise step by step, then put it up for auction, choose the best offer, and use the money to expand your building empire.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
